title: A Trusted Friend 💙
excerpt: Trusted Friends are now fully protected just like pinned friends — plus tutorials, badges, notifications, and a massive overhaul.
body: Roblox added Trusted Friends a while ago, but we realized we could use them in a much better way inside Friends Remover. Trusted Friends are now fully protected just like pinned friends, meaning they can no longer accidentally be removed by you or by any background removal systems.

added.moreInfo: Trusted Friends are now treated the same as pinned friends and are fully protected from manual removals and automatic/background removals.

added.text: Added Trusted Friends support everywhere pinned friends are supported
added.moreInfo: Trusted Friends now work with all systems that previously only supported pinned friends.

added.text: Added Auto Re-Add Removed Pinned Friends setting
added.moreInfo: If a pinned friend gets removed somehow, Friends Remover can automatically attempt to re-add them.
New users will now see a guided tutorial explaining the popup, removal system, selection system, and major buttons. Tutorials are skippable for new users only.

added.text: Added notification system powered by our worker
added.moreInfo: Important alerts, outages, announcements, and notices can now appear directly inside the popup.

added.text: Added Roblox badges next to usernames
added.moreInfo: Users can now display badges such as Verified, Roblox Admin, Star Creator, Premium, and more.
Users who use Friends Remover can now show a sleek Friends Remover badge next to their profile.

added.text: Added notifications when somebody removes you
added.moreInfo: If somebody removes you from their friends list, Friends Remover can now notify you.
Extra protection was added to prevent accidental removals and improve reliability during large removals.
The extension can now dynamically reduce animations depending on how fast or slow your device is.

added.text: Added Speed Arrows in Compact View
added.moreInfo: Holding the arrows now instantly jumps to the first or last friend in your list.
Shhh... it has something to do with interacting with the developer as a friend in Compact View.

added.text: Added warning when removing large or important users
added.moreInfo: Extra warnings now appear when attempting to remove users such as admins, verified users, or Star Creators.

added.text: Added toggle for bad users visibility
added.moreInfo: You can now choose whether bad users flagged by Rotectors API are shown or hidden.

removed.moreInfo: Dark Mode may return in the future, but for now it has been removed due to maintenance and usability issues.

fixed: Fixed multiple selection being extremely glitchy
Fixed inactivity tracker incorrectly running during removals
Fixed inactivity tracker triggering during tutorials

fixed.moreInfo: The extension now handles offline saving and API downtime much better using improved local storage systems.
Animations and heavy effects are now temporarily paused automatically if the extension detects lag or FPS instability.

improved.text: Pins now save after closing the popup
improved.moreInfo: Pinned users are no longer instantly synced every time you pin or unpin somebody. Changes now save after closing the popup for much better performance.

improved.text: Settings now save after closing the settings page
improved.moreInfo: Settings are now batched together and saved only after leaving settings instead of constantly syncing changes.
Block Mode now includes a dedicated logo and temporarily changes the popup theme to blue while enabled without affecting your actual saved theme.
Warnings for bad users are now cleaner, easier to understand, and less intrusive.
Game statuses now use sleek toast notifications instead of modals.
Users currently in-game now have subtle shadows added to their avatars for cleaner visuals.
Long game titles are now displayed better and unnecessary title tags like (NEW), (UPD), and similar text are automatically cleaned.
Friend activity and status updates now refresh faster.
Selecting friends is now much cleaner and easier. Simply use the checkmark system instead of holding users.

improved.text: Replaced confirmation and success modals with clickable toasts
improved.moreInfo: The popup now feels significantly faster and cleaner during removals and actions.
You are now considered inactive after 1 minute of no popup interaction and are given a 30 second warning before the popup closes.

improved.text: Updated statuses to use a new API
improved.moreInfo: Statuses are now powered by a cleaner and easier-to-maintain API.

experimental.moreInfo: When severe lag is detected, Friends Remover can temporarily disable animations until performance stabilizes.

other: Pinned users now display with gold usernames
You can no longer pin users flagged as bad by Rotectors API
Bad user flags are provided by Rotectors public API
Notification system currently only appears inside the popup
Popup performance has been heavily optimized throughout the extension
